title: Burn 'Em Up Barnes
writer: Raymond L. Schrock, Harry L. Fraser
actors: Johnny Hines, Edmund Breese, Betty Carpenter
plot: Car racer Burn 'em Up Barnes, son of a wealthy manufacturer, leaves home to make his own way in the world. After being robbed by hoodlums, Barnes joins a group of hobos who take him in and show him the carefree life.
